import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torchvision.models import resnet50

def get_transform():
    import torchvision.transforms as transforms
    return transforms.Compose([
        transforms.Resize((64, 256)),
        transforms.ToTensor(),
        transforms.Normalize((0.5,), (0.5,)),
    ])

class Attention(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, encoder_dim, decoder_dim, attention_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder_att = nn.Linear(encoder_dim, attention_dim)
        self.decoder_att = nn.Linear(decoder_dim, attention_dim)
        self.full_att = nn.Linear(attention_dim, 1)
        self.relu = nn.ReLU()
        self.softmax = nn.Softmax(dim=1)

    def forward(self, encoder_out, decoder_hidden):
        att1 = self.encoder_att(encoder_out)
        att2 = self.decoder_att(decoder_hidden)
        att = self.full_att(self.relu(att1 + att2.unsqueeze(1))).squeeze(2)
        alpha = self.softmax(att)
        attention_weighted_encoding = (encoder_out * alpha.unsqueeze(2)).sum(dim=1)
        return attention_weighted_encoding, alpha

class Encoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, encoded_dim=512):
        super().__init__()
        resnet = resnet50(weights='IMAGENET1K_V2')
        weight = resnet.conv1.weight.data.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)
        resnet.conv1 = nn.Conv2d(1, 64, kernel_size=7, stride=2, padding=3, bias=False)
        resnet.conv1.weight.data.copy_(weight)
        self.resnet = nn.Sequential(*list(resnet.children())[:-2])
        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(2048, encoded_dim, kernel_size=1)
        self.encoded_dim = encoded_dim

    def forward(self, x):
        features = self.resnet(x)
        features = self.conv(features)
        features = features.flatten(2).permute(0, 2, 1)  # B, seq_len, encoded_dim
        return features

class Decoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, encoded_dim, vocab_size, hidden_size=256, num_layers=1, attention_dim=256, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        self.vocab_size = vocab_size
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, hidden_size)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.attention = Attention(encoded_dim, hidden_size, attention_dim)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            hidden_size + encoded_dim,
            hidden_size,
            num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        )
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_size, vocab_size)
        self.init_h = nn.Linear(encoded_dim, hidden_size * num_layers)
        self.init_c = nn.Linear(encoded_dim, hidden_size * num_layers)

    def forward(self, features, targets=None):
        batch_size = features.size(0)
        mean_features = features.mean(dim=1)
        h0 = self.init_h(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size)
        c0 = self.init_c(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size)
        hidden = (h0, c0)
        if targets is not None:
            embeds = self.embedding(targets)
            outputs = []
            for t in range(embeds.size(1)):
                context, _ = self.attention(features, hidden[0][-1])
                lstm_input = torch.cat((embeds[:, t:t+1, :], context.unsqueeze(1)), dim=2)
                lstm_out, hidden = self.lstm(lstm_input, hidden)
                out = self.fc(self.dropout(lstm_out.squeeze(1)))
                outputs.append(out)
            outputs = torch.stack(outputs, dim=1)
            return outputs
        else:
            raise NotImplementedError("Use generate for inference")

    def generate(self, features, max_len=150):
        batch_size = features.size(0)
        device = features.device
        inputs = torch.full((batch_size, 1), 1, dtype=torch.long, device=device)  # <sos>
        mean_features = features.mean(dim=1)
        h0 = self.init_h(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size)
        c0 = self.init_c(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size)
        hidden = (h0, c0)
        sequences = [[] for _ in range(batch_size)]
        finished = [False] * batch_size
        for _ in range(max_len):
            embeds = self.embedding(inputs)
            context, _ = self.attention(features, hidden[0][-1])
            lstm_input = torch.cat((embeds, context.unsqueeze(1)), dim=2)
            lstm_out, hidden = self.lstm(lstm_input, hidden)
            output = self.fc(self.dropout(lstm_out.squeeze(1)))
            top1 = output.argmax(dim=-1)
            inputs = top1.unsqueeze(1)
            for i in range(batch_size):
                if not finished[i]:
                    token_id = top1[i].item()
                    if token_id == 2:  # <eos>
                        finished[i] = True
                    else:
                        sequences[i].append(token_id)
            if all(finished):
                break
        return sequences

class MathExprRecognizer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size, hidden_size=256, encoded_dim=512, num_layers=1):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = Encoder(encoded_dim=encoded_dim)
        self.decoder = Decoder(encoded_dim, vocab_size, hidden_size, num_layers)

    def forward(self, images, targets=None):
        features = self.encoder(images)
        return self.decoder(features, targets)

    def generate(self, images, max_len=150):
        features = self.encoder(images)
        return self.decoder.generate(features, max_len)
